name: cv
description: Single source of truth for Matija Stepanić's CV — data, PDF builds, website and job-application tooling

scripts.stats: npm run stats:github && npm run stats:claude
scripts.web:build: npm run validate && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.deploy: npm run web:build && npx wrangler deploy -c web/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.build: npm run validate && npm run pdf && npm run web:build
